ideation: This sequence simulates the action of holding two flags, one in each hand, crossing them in front of the body.  The animation will focus on a smooth, symmetrical crossing of the arms, emphasizing the crossing of the imaginary flags.  The robot will start with arms slightly outward, palms up and then bring the arms together in a crossing motion, ending with the arms slightly angled downward.  I will ensure smooth transitions between frames and reference the existing examples to ensure the movements feel natural and appropriate for the robot's mechanics.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, palms up, ready to cross
arms begin to cross in front, a gentle sweep
flags meet and cross at the center, held high
